title.en: I didn't see that coming! 전혀 생각지도 못했어요!

description.en: When you're surprised by something sudden! Learn the difference between 'Saeng-gak-ji-do mot-haet-da' and 'Ye-sang-ha-ji mot-haet-da'.
description.ko: 갑작스러운 일에 깜짝 놀랐을 때! '생각지도 못했다'와 '예상하지 못했다'의 차이를 재미있게 배워봅니다.

content.speaker: John
content.text: What's up world. Welcome back to Talkori. I'm your host. John.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 안녕하세요 여러분~! 오늘도 즐거운 한국어 시간입니다. 미나입니다.
content.translation: Hello everyone~! It's a fun Korean class again today. I'm Mina.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Mina. I just saw my neighbor. Walking a pet pig. A real giant pig.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 하하하! "그건 정말 생각지도 못했네요~!"
content.translation: Hahaha! I really didn't see that coming~!

insight.title: 생각지도 못했다
insight.usage_tip: Used for something so out of the ordinary that it never crossed your mind.

content.speaker: John
content.text: I know. I was so shocked. I almost dropped my phone.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 와~ 정말 "상상도 못할" 일이네요! 오늘 주제가 바로 이거예요!
content.translation: Wow~ that's something 'I couldn't even imagine'! This is our topic today!

insight.title: 상상도 못하다
insight.usage_tip: A stronger version of 'I didn't see that coming'.

content.speaker: John
content.text: It was so unexpected. How do I say. I didn't see that coming.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 가장 많이 쓰는 표현은. "생각지도 못했어요." 예요.
content.translation: The most common expression is. 'Saeng-gak-ji-do mot-hae-sseo-yo'.

content.speaker: John
content.text: "생각지도 못했어요."
content.translation: I didn't even think about it.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 그리고 조금 더 격식 있게 말할 땐. "예상하지 못했어요." 라고 합니다.
content.translation: And when you speak a bit more formally. You say. 'Ye-sang-ha-ji mot-hae-sseo-yo'.

content.speaker: John
content.text: So "Ye-sang" is like a prediction.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요! 전혀 몰랐을 때는. "전혀 생각지도 못했어요." 라고 하면 완벽해요!
content.translation: Exactly! When you had no idea. 'Jeon-hyeo saeng-gak-ji-do mot-hae-sseo-yo' is perfect!

content.speaker: John
content.text: "전혀..., 생각지도 못했어요~!"
content.translation: I didn't see that coming at all~!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Mina. I have a surprise gift for you. Close your eyes.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 와~ "생각지도 못한 선물인데요~?"
content.translation: Wow~ a gift I didn't even think of~!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Keep them closed..., okay. Open them now!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 어?
content.translation: Huh?

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: "이게 뭐야~!"
content.translation: What is this~!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 존 씨. 이건 제 밀린 업무 서류잖아요!
content.translation: John. These are my overdue work documents!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Happy surprise. I found them on the printer. I thought you needed them.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 아~ "이런 건 전혀 예상하지 못했어요...," 정말 기가 막히네요.
content.translation: Ah~ I didn't see this coming at all..., truly breathtaking.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Did you like it.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: "전혀요!" 정말 꿈에도 몰랐어요!
content.translation: Not at all! I didn't even know in my dreams!

insight.title: 꿈에도 몰랐다
insight.description: Didn't even know in one's dreams
insight.usage_tip: Used to emphasize that something was completely unexpected.

content.speaker: John
content.text: These reactions are so useful for surprise parties. Or surprise homework.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 맞아요. 깜짝 놀랄 일이 생기면 오늘 배운 표현들을 꼭 써보세요!
content.translation: Exactly. When something surprising happens. Make sure to use the expressions we learned today!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Let's review the five reactions.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Number one. "생각지도 못했어요."
content.translation: I didn't even think about it.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Number two. "전혀 생각지도 못했어요~!"
content.translation: I didn't see that coming at all~!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Number three. "예상하지 못했어요."
content.translation: I didn't expect it.

content.speaker: John
content.text: Number four. "상상도 못했어요!"
content.translation: I couldn't even imagine it!

content.speaker: John
content.text: Number five. "꿈에도 몰랐어요!"
content.translation: I never even dreamed of it!

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 여러분도 예상치 못한 행운이 찾아오길 바랄게요!
content.translation: I hope unexpected good luck finds you all!

content.speaker: John
content.text: That's all for today. See you in the next episode.

content.speaker: Mina
content.text: 다음에 또 만나요. 안녕~!
content.translation: See you again next time. Bye~!

vocabulary.example: 생각지도 못한 선물을 받았어요. (I received a gift I didn't even think of.)
제 예상이 맞았어요. (My prediction was right.)
전혀 모르겠어요. (I have no idea at all.)
상상도 하기 싫어요. (I don't even want to imagine it.)
어제 무서운 꿈을 꿨어요. (I had a scary dream yesterday.)
당신에게 행운이 있길 바래요. (I wish you good luck.)
